sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Mecha Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a humanoid Assault Suit with full land capabilities and minor air capabilities. Suit equipped with variety of weapons and special accessories.

tier_notes: T2 designation indicates empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source provides game context and features but contains no documented physics values, movement parameters, gravity constants, or jump mechanics. Instruction manual noted as containing inconsistent information regarding suit dimensions (5 stories tall vs 4 stories in promo material) but no movement physics data provided.
